products.title: BGLAM Gel polish 15ml | Diamond Glitter | Flash Effect 4
BGLAM Gel polish 15ml | Diamond Glitter | Flash Effect  1
Kit Ring Light RL18II | 55W | 3200-5500K | Ø17.5in | Stand 36,5-175cm
products.body_html:
Pro Glow
Ring Light Kit RL18II
Ref. RL18II · 55W · Bi-Color 3200–5500K
Studio-quality light, anywhere you create.

The Pro Glow Ring Light Kit RL18II delivers professional-grade, shadowless illumination for beauty professionals, content creators, and photographers who demand consistent, flattering light in any setting.

Powered by 55W of high-output LED, this 18-inch ring light produces a smooth, even glow that eliminates harsh shadows and reveals true colors — ideal for nail art, lash extensions, makeup application, and professional photography or video.

The bi-color temperature range (3200K–5500K) lets you seamlessly shift from warm candlelight tones to crisp daylight — all with a simple dial adjustment. With a CRI of over 90, colors appear exactly as they are under natural light.

Technical Specifications

Power 55W
Color Temperature 3200K – 5500K
CRI (Color Rendering) > 90
Dimming Range 10% – 100%
Outer Diameter 44.5 cm / 18 in
Stand Height 36.5 – 175 cm
Input Voltage 100–240V / 50–60Hz
Weight 1.8 kg

What's in the Box

  • RL18II ring light
  • Adjustable light stand
  • Smartphone holder
  • Ball head / tilt mount
  • Carry bag

BGLAM CARVED GEL 4D | Floral Effect  | Pearl White 01 | 30ml
products.body_html:
BGLAM Flower Sculpt Gel is a high-viscosity 4D carving gel designed to create raised floral and petal designs with clean definition and long-lasting hold.

  • 3D Flower Sculpting: Ideal for petals, flowers, and relief nail art
  • Thick & Stable Texture: Stays in place for precise shaping
  • No Wipe Finish: Smooth surface, perfect for detailed work
  • Salon-Grade: Strong hold after curing

How to use: Sculpt the flower details with a tool or brush, then cure under LED/UV lamp. Finish as desired.

Size: 30ml

products.title: Pierre Cardin | Roll On | Soft Touch | 50 ml
products.body_html:
Pierre Cardin Soft Touch Roll-On

Pierre Cardin Soft Touch Roll-On is designed for high absorbency and effective body odor control, providing a bare skin sensation. This roll-on deodorant offers long-lasting protection and keeps you feeling fresh throughout the day.

Volume: 50ml

Directions: Apply to clean, dry underarms. Allow to dry completely before dressing.

Warnings: For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Store at room temperature. Keep out of reach of children.

products.title: Pierre Cardin Studio Nails | 013 | 11,5 ml
products.body_html:
A new generation of super longlasting  glossy nail polish with high color intensity. The improved process gives better light reflection, higher luminosity and intensity. Thanks to its flawless fluid texture gliding perfectly on nails and its special brush, you have perfect control on application. 


Shake well before use. It is advised to be applied as 2 coats for the correct color and a long lasting perfect stay. Follow with Nails Top Coat.

products.title: Ready-to-Use Wax Strips | Small Size Pink | Sensitive Skin | Rose Scent | 10 Strips
products.body_html:
The Waxkiss ready-to-use wax strips are specially formulated for smooth and gentle hair removal, making them ideal for sensitive skin. Their delicate rose fragrance provides a fresh and pleasant feeling during and after waxing.

Features:

  • 5 double strips per pack (10 usable strips)
  • Strip size: 4.5 × 9.25 cm (small size)
  • Scent: Rose
  • Suitable for: legs, arms, underarms, bikini area, and delicate zones
  • Includes French labels

Benefits:

  • Ready to use – no heating or preparation needed
  • Gentle formula ideal for sensitive skin
  • Effectively removes short hairs from 2 mm
  • Keeps skin smooth for up to 4 weeks
  • Compact and practical for travel or quick touch-ups

How to Use:

Warm the strip between your hands for a few seconds. Separate the strips, apply in the direction of hair growth, smooth down, and remove quickly against hair growth.

Logistics Information:

  • Fragrance: Pink Rose
  • Carton size: 34.5 × 24.5 × 33 cm
  • Carton weight: 10.5 kg

products.title: 100g Wax Beads | Lavender | Thick & Coarse Hair Removal
products.body_html:
The Lavender Hard Wax Beans offer smooth, effective hair removal without the need for strips. Their high-performance hard wax formula grips hair firmly while remaining gentle on sensitive skin. Perfect for armpits, bikini area, face, and other delicate zones.

Features:

  • Weight: 100g
  • Wax Type: Hard Wax Beans
  • Scent: Lavender
  • Color: Deep purple
  • No strips required
  • Suitable for sensitive skin

Benefits:

  • Strong grip removes even short hairs
  • Lavender extract helps soothe and calm the skin
  • Flexible texture for easy removal
  • Fast-drying for efficient waxing sessions

Recommended Areas:

  • Armpits
  • Bikini line
  • Legs
  • Arms
  • Face (except eyebrows)

How to Use:

Heat the wax at around 55–60°C until smooth. Apply in the direction of hair growth, let it harden, then remove with a quick and firm pull.

Logistics Information:

  • Resealable pouch for long-lasting freshness
  • Net weight: 100g

products.title: 100g Wax Beads | Y8 Formula | Thick & Coarse Hair Removal
products.body_html:
The Y8 round wax beads are specially designed to remove coarse and thick hair, making them ideal for bikini and armpit areas. They deliver strong grip while remaining gentle on the skin.

Features:

  • Weight: 100g
  • Formula: Y8 – for coarse hair
  • Bead Shape: Round
  • Color / Scent: Yellow – Lemon
  • Recommended for: Bikini, armpits, sensitive areas
  • Includes French labels

Benefits:

  • Strong grip removes thick hairs in one pull
  • Suitable for sensitive and difficult zones
  • Fast melting and smooth application
  • Flexible formula reduces discomfort

How to Use:

Melt the wax at around 55–60°C until smooth. Apply a thick layer in the direction of hair growth, let it set, then remove with a firm pull.

Logistics Information:

  • Color: Yellow – Lemon
  • Carton size: 30.5 × 30.5 × 29.8 cm
  • Carton weight: 10.5 kg

products.body_html:
This high-performance 30W LED panel light delivers powerful, uniform illumination ideal for beauty studios, nail technicians, barbers, photography setups, and professional workspaces requiring precise lighting.

Main Features:

  • Power: 30W – bright, energy-efficient lighting.
  • 308 high-quality lamp beads for uniform light distribution.
  • Adjustable color temperature: 3000K to 6500K.
  • 3 lighting modes to suit all environments (warm, neutral, daylight).
  • Color rendering index RA > 90 for true and accurate color visibility.
  • Dual voltage: 110V / 240V – 50Hz–60Hz

products.title: High-Temperature Sterilization Cabinet SM-220 | 8000 ml | 600 W
Sun S6 | 168 W | 365nm+405nm
products.body_html:
⚠️ Warning – Safety

Never look directly at the UV LED lamp while it is on. This lamp emits UV-A rays (long wavelength) which can damage the retina and eyes upon direct or repeated exposure. Keep out of reach of children. For prolonged use, wear UV-protective glasses.

French Nail Tips 32PCS | YS-515-390-2
products.body_html:
Get a flawless French manicure in minutes! Our 150-piece French nail tips set combines professional quality with effortless beauty. Designed for both beginners and nail experts, these pre-shaped pink-and-white tips give a natural, salon-perfect look every time.
  • Premium Quality: Made from durable, high-grade ABS material for a lightweight and comfortable fit.
  • Natural Finish: Soft pink base and crisp white tip for a timeless French manicure style.
  • Easy to Apply: Works perfectly with nail glue, gel, or acrylic systems.
  • 32 Pieces: Comes in 10 different sizes to fit all nail shapes.
  • Professional Results: Suitable for salons and home users seeking perfect nails instantly.

How to use:
Select the correct size, apply glue, press for a few seconds, then file and finish with a top coat or gel for extra shine.

Package Includes: 150PCS Pre-shaped French Nail Tips in a reusable storage box.

⚠️ Warning – Safety

Never look directly at the UV LED lamp while it is on. This lamp emits UV-A rays (long wavelength) which can damage the retina and eyes upon direct or repeated exposure. Keep out of reach of children. For prolonged use, wear UV-protective glasses.

products.body_html:
Cleaning Required

Important: This airbrush must be cleaned after each use to prevent clogging and ensure proper performance. Gel, paint, or pigment residue can block the nozzle if not cleaned immediately.

  • Run cleaner through the airbrush until it sprays clear.
  • Regular maintenance helps extend the lifetime of the device.
